title: Oscar N. Onyema Received WASRA Awards
description: During Oscar recognition by the West African Securities Regulators Association (WASRA) for his contribution and support in shaping the integration of capital markets in the region yesterday 26 October
html: During Oscar recognition by the West African Securities Regulators Association (WASRA) for his contribution and support in shaping the integration of capital markets in the region yesterday 26 October 2023 at Eko Hotel in Lagos.
